case_title: ORR, SAI C. VS SHEK, JACQUELINE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHEK, JACQUELINE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORR, SAI C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEK, JACQUELINE $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,505.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2900.00 FOR PROPERTY LOSS, AND $1100.00 FOR BODILY INJURY-A TOTAL OF $4000.00. THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 40% COMPARATIVE NEGLIGENCE TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ORR, SAI C. AS TO DEFENDANT SHEK, JACQUELINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SHEK, JACQUELINE
